zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：短线震荡偏强，关注突破方向
zh.content:
当前ETH/USD维持窄幅震荡，最新价贴近1635一线，24小时波动极小，说明市场多空暂时均衡。价格持续运行于SMA20均线1588上方，中短期趋势仍偏多，资金情绪相对稳定，但上涨动能尚未明显放大。

从技术指标观察，MACD数值维持正区间，表明多头结构尚未破坏，市场存在继续上探可能。不过Signal数据缺失，且RSI暂无有效参考，因此短线趋势确认度不足，预计后续仍以区间整理和试探性突破为主。

支撑方面，1629附近形成日内第一支撑，若跌破则可能回踩1615区域；上方1636至1645构成短线压力带，只有放量突破后，行情才有机会进一步挑战1660关口。目前价格贴近压力位，需警惕冲高回落风险。

交易策略上，激进交易者可关注1630附近低吸机会，止损设于1618下方；稳健者则等待有效突破1645后顺势跟进。当前市场波动率较低，不宜重仓追高，建议结合成交量变化与美元指数走势进行动态调整。

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Ethereum is trading at 1635.03, holding near the upper end of the recent 24-hour range between 1629.87 and 1636.23. The broader short-term structure remains constructive, as price continues to trade comfortably above the 20-period simple moving average at 1588.14. This positioning suggests buyers maintain control of the prevailing trend, although the very limited daily percentage change indicates a period of consolidation rather than aggressive directional momentum.

The moving average relationship is a positive technical signal, with ETH trading roughly 3% above the SMA(20), reflecting sustained underlying strength. MACD stands at 11.81, remaining in positive territory and indicating bullish momentum is still present. However, the absence of a signal line limits confirmation of momentum acceleration. RSI data is unavailable, making it difficult to assess whether the market is approaching overbought or oversold conditions. As a result, price action and moving-average behavior become more important for near-term analysis.

From a support and resistance perspective, immediate support is located near 1630, corresponding closely with the session low. A break below this area could expose a pullback toward 1600, followed by stronger structural support around the SMA(20) near 1588. On the upside, resistance is evident around 1636, the recent high. A decisive breakout above this level could open the path toward the psychological 1650 region, where traders may encounter increased profit-taking activity.

For trading purposes, bullish participants may favor maintaining a constructive bias while price remains above 1630 and especially above the 1588–1600 support zone. Breakout traders could look for sustained movement above 1636 as confirmation of renewed upward momentum. More conservative traders may wait for either a successful retest of support or a clear breakout before entering new positions. Risk management remains essential, as low volatility conditions can quickly transition into sharper directional moves.
